knownIssues.resolution: Added npm override in server/package.json forcing exceljs to use unzipper@^0.12.3 which dropped the binary→buffers chain entirely. Verified buffers and binary are no longer in the dependency tree.

knownIssues.pulledInBy: vite (dev dependency — never shipped to users)
knownIssues.action: Acceptable. CC-BY-4.0 is a data/creative-works license. This package is build-time only and not bundled into the application. No attribution required in shipped code.
knownIssues.notes: Dev dependency only. Does not affect runtime or distribution.
Dual-licensed. MIT option is fully AGPL-3.0 compatible.

sourceHeaders.status: NOT PRESENT — no source files contain AGPL headers
sourceHeaders.note: AGPL section 5 requires each file to carry a notice. Minimum: copyright line + SPDX identifier.

section13NetworkUse.description: App is served over a network (Raspberry Pi + Nginx). Under AGPL-3.0 Section 13, users who interact with the software over a network must be offered a way to receive the Corresponding Source.
section13NetworkUse.status: IMPLEMENTED — Source Code link in Sidebar footer (Sidebar.tsx)
section13NetworkUse.note: Link points to GitHub repo. Verify repo is public and kept up to date with deployed version.
